item.title: [Segurança] Attackers Exploit Three Fortinet FortiSandbox Flaws, One Patched Last Week
item.description:
🚨 Attackers Exploit Three Fortinet FortiSandbox Flaws, One Patched Last Week
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Bad actors are exploiting multiple security vulnerabilities in Fortinet FortiSandbox, according to threat intelligence firm Defused Cyber. In a post shared on X, the company said it has observed exploitation of CVE-2026-39813, CVE-2026-39808, and CVE-2026-25089 over the past 24 hours. CVE-2026-39813 (CVSS score: 9.1) refers to a path traversal vulnerability in FortiSandbox JRPC API that could
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/attackers-exploit-three-fortinet.html

item.title: [Segurança] CISA Flags LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin Flaw Exploited for Root Privilege Escalation
item.description:
🚨 CISA Flags LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin Flaw Exploited for Root Privilege Escalation
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.5
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has added a security flaw impacting LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog, requiring Federal Civilian Executive Branch (FCEB) agencies to apply the fixes by June 18, 2026. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-54420 (CVSS score: 8.5), which has been described as a case of privilege
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cisa-flags-litespeed-cpanel-plugin-flaw.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-47835 - Elastic
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-47835 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.6
Resumo:
In Spring AI Vector Stores, special characters could be used to force the execution of arbitrary queries in Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, and GemFire VectorDB. Affected components: spring-ai-elasticsearch-store, spring-ai-opensearch-store, spring-ai-gemfire-store. Affected versions: Spring AI 1.0.0 through 1.0.x (fix 1.0.9).
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47835

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8349-3: rsync regression
item.description:
🚨 USN-8349-3: rsync regression
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Unfortunately that update introduced multiple regressions in rsync functionality. Original advisory details: Calum Hutton discovered that rsync contained a heap-based out-of-bounds read when handling file transfers. A remote attacker with read access to an rsync server could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service. (CVE-2025-10158) Batuhan Sancak, Damien Neil, and Michael Stapelberg discovered that rsync...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8349-3

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-48017 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-48017 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
In versions 7.1.8 and prior, the POST /runners/load-reader endpoint in DbGate accepts a functionName parameter that is directly interpolated into a JavaScript code template without any sanitization or validation. An authenticated user (with basic access, no special permissions required) can inject arbitrary JavaScript code that executes on the server with full process privileges, bypassing the require=null sandbox re...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48017

item.title: [Segurança] Cisco Releases Security Updates for Actively Exploited SD-WAN Manager Flaw
item.description:
🚨 Cisco Releases Security Updates for Actively Exploited SD-WAN Manager Flaw
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
Cisco has released security updates for a medium-severity security flaw in Catalyst SD-WAN Manager that has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-20262, carries a CVSS score of 6.5 out of 10.0. "A vulnerability in the web UI of Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, formerly SD-WAN vManage, could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to create a file or
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cisco-releases-security-updates-for.html

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-50892 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-50892 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Incorrect access control in the "Let's Encrypt" certificate download endpoint of Nginx Proxy Manager v2.14.0 allows authenticated attackers to obtain the TLS private key material via a crafted GET request.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50892

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-6045 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-6045 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
LibreOffice can import EMF+ graphics, which may be embedded in documents. A heap buffer overflow existed when importing an EMF+ gradient brush. The number of gradient blend points was read from the file and used to compute an allocation size, but that multiplication could overflow, so a small buffer was allocated and then filled as if it were large, writing past its end. In fixed versions the blend-point count is che...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-6045

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] DragonForce Ransomware Exploited Microsoft Teams to Hide in Attack Against Major Company - Infosecurity Magazine
item.description:
💣 DragonForce Ransomware Exploited Microsoft Teams to Hide in Attack Against Major Company - Infosecurity Magazine
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTE5xN2pEVW9HR0lTc3hYR0JaZmZzNUNkazhSR01QNW1pQ3QyV05lZ2JzdUY2UjhDajkwV0k4R2NfMUZBVWp1SG1kME1PWUZJcTkwaDVFRF9MZjRjdGRDX2s1amdzQXhheG9ERDhCeDEwVEVvbHowOFI0c1VDMmNvZw?oc=5

item.title: [Segurança] Critical Fortinet FortiSandbox flaws now exploited in attacks
item.description:
💣 Critical Fortinet FortiSandbox flaws now exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers are now exploiting several critical vulnerabilities in Fortinet's FortiSandbox cyber threat detection platform, according to threat intelligence company Defused.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/critical-fortinet-fortisandbox-flaws-now-exploited-in-attacks/

item.description:

Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/16/vmware-cloud-foundation-9-1-path-for-dell-vxrail-customers/

item.title: [Segurança] Windows version of SprySOCKS Linux malware used to attack govt orgs
item.description:
📰 Windows version of SprySOCKS Linux malware used to attack govt orgs
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Windows variants for the SprySOCKS Linux malware have been used in attacks targeting government organizations in at least four countries.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/windows-version-of-sprysocks-linux-malware-used-to-attack-govt-orgs/

A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Office, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.

item.title: [Segurança] GhostTree Attack Abused Recursive Windows Junctions to Hide Malware
item.description:
📰 GhostTree Attack Abused Recursive Windows Junctions to Hide Malware
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
GhostTree uses recursive NTFS junctions to generate vast numbers of valid Windows file paths. Varonis explains how the technique could cause Microsoft Defender folder scans to never complete, leaving malware undetected.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/ghosttree-attack-abused-recursive-windows-junctions-to-hide-malware/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Docker joins the Athena coalition: a cross-industry collaboration for supply chain security
item.description:
📰 Docker joins the Athena coalition: a cross-industry collaboration for supply chain security
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The obvious takeaway from 2026's biggest incidents is that attackers are increasingly using AI to move fast. Docker's CISO, Mark Lechner, wrote about this shift and what every engineering team should do now. What worries us is that the bar is about to drop further. For most of the last decade, finding a serious vulnerability...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/docker-joins-the-athena-coalition-a-cross-industry-collaboration-for-supply-chain-security/

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Making Waves: Elastic named a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave™: Extended Detection And Response Platforms, Q2 2026
item.description:
📰 Making Waves: Elastic named a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave™: Extended Detection And Response Platforms, Q2 2026
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Elastic has been named a Strong Performer in The Forrester Wave™: Extended Detection And Response Platforms, Q2 2026. Elastic Security is the agentic security operations platform built to secure, not to tax.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/forrester-wave-strong-performer-extended-detection-and-response-platforms-2026

item.title: [Infraestrutura] Streamlining CI/CD and GitOps on VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service with Harness, Wiz, and Dynatrace
item.description:
📰 Streamlining CI/CD and GitOps on VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service with Harness, Wiz, and Dynatrace
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
With VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9, the focus for platform teams has shifted from simply providing infrastructure to enabling seamless, secure application delivery. As organizations scale their containerized workloads, the challenge lies in balancing developer velocity with operational guardrails. In this article, we are diving into how you can build a robust, enterprise-grade delivery pipeline …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/16/streamlining-ci-cd-and-gitops-on-vmware-vsphere-kubernetes-service-with-harness-wiz-and-dynatrace/
